overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Mafia III) showing a character in a beige suit walking through a 1960s New Orleans-style historic district. The character navigates wet sidewalks, crosses streets with vintage cars, and walks through covered arcades under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic church district sidewalk with stone pavement

events.description: vintage white sedan drives past on the wet street
character steps onto crosswalk to cross the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone sidewalk past the church, approaching the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: man in brown jacket walking in opposite direction along the sidewalk
vintage teal car driving past on the street

entered.detail: tall gothic stone church tower with arched windows and pointed spires
neon sign for The Crazy Lady establishment with decorative border
black cast iron street lamp post with curved design
gothic stone church front with arched doorways and detailed masonry

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet cobblestone sidewalk beside a historic stone church. The camera follows from behind as vintage cars drive past on the adjacent street. The character approaches a crosswalk in front of the church tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk opposite the church with telephone booth and newspaper stands

events.description: crosses the street from church side to opposite sidewalk
character turns left to continue along the sidewalk away from the church

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt street and continuing along the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: man in fedora hat leaning against the building wall

entered.detail: black sidewalk A-frame signboard with white text
red and glass telephone booth with Telephone signage on top

segments.scene_description: After crossing the street, the character walks along the opposite sidewalk passing a telephone booth and newspaper stand. The church tower remains visible in the background to the left as the character continues past brick buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with telephone booth and shuttered storefronts

events.description: vintage cream and wood station wagon drives past on the street
character briefly runs then returns to walking pace

agents.ego_description: walking past the telephone booth and various storefronts, briefly breaking into a run

notable_agents.action: man in hat and vest walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
vintage blue station wagon parked at the curb

entered.detail: mature trees with thick trunks planted in sidewalk planters
red painted fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the narrow sidewalk lined with mature trees and brick buildings, passing a red fire hydrant and various pedestrians. Vintage cars are parked along the curb as the character moves past the telephone booth area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with green striped awnings

events.description: enters covered walkway with green and white striped canvas awnings
lighting shifts to artificial lamps under the covered arcade

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade passing seated pedestrians and hanging plants

notable_agents.action: woman in polka dot dress sitting on a wooden bench against the wall

entered.detail: green and white striped canvas awning covering the walkway with hanging light fixtures
potted fern plants hanging from the building facade under the awning
wooden slatted bench against the storefront wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered walkway with distinctive green and white striped awnings overhead. The lighting becomes softer and mixed with artificial lamps. The character passes a woman sitting on a bench and hanging plants while walking on brick pavement.

events.description: exits covered walkway back into open street intersection
character steps onto crosswalk to cross the wet intersection

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered walkway and crossing the wet street at the intersection

entered.detail: row of historic two-story brick buildings with iron balconies
wet asphalt intersection with white crosswalk lines

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered arcade into a wide open intersection. Historic buildings with balconies line the opposite side of the street. The character steps onto the crosswalk to cross the wet asphalt road as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a historic urban district, transitioning from an open street beside a stone church into a sheltered arcade before emerging back into a wide intersection. It begins by following the character along a wet cobblestone sidewalk past a towering church as vintage cars drive by on the adjacent road. As the character crosses the street, the scene shifts to a sidewalk lined with brick buildings, passing a telephone booth and newspaper stand while mature trees and parked cars frame the path. The camera then follows the character into a covered walkway, where the open sky is replaced by green and white striped awnings and the lighting softens under artificial lamps. Finally, the character exits the arcade and steps back onto the wet asphalt of a wide intersection, facing historic buildings with balconies across the street.
